ogTitle: East Popanyinning vs East Rockingham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Popanyinning and East Rockingham.
heading: East Popanyinning vs East Rockingham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Popanyinning, Western Australia and East Rockingham, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Popanyinning has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to East Rockingham (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Popanyinning or East Rockingham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Popanyinning has a flood risk score of 58/100, while East Rockingham scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Popanyinning scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. East Rockingham scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Popanyinning or East Rockingham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Popanyinning has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
